query:
SELECT EXTRACT(DOW  FROM created_at AT TIME ZONE $2::text)::int AS "dow!",
                  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at AT TIME ZONE $2::text)::int AS "hour!",
                  AVG(score)::float8 AS "avg!",
                  COUNT(*)           AS "n!"
           FROM mood_entries
           WHERE user_id = $1 AND created_at >= $3 AND created_at < $4
           GROUP BY 1, 2
           ORDER BY 1, 2
